case_title: SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS. CLYDE DE GUZMAN SEEGMILLER ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEEGMILLER, CLYDE DE GUZMAN $3,057.67 PRINCIPAL, $630.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $208.59 INTEREST, $346.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,242.66, SEE SCANNED DOC
